activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
AB Volvo Penta
Gropegårdsgatan 11
SE-405 08, Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
AB Volvo Penta
Gropegårdsgatan 11
40508 Göteborg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor identified as 'AB Volvo Penta' both in certificate and invoice. Normalization of company name and address (including legal form and street naming) performed according to rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.2. Land 'Sweden' matches exactly after normalization. No contradictions found.

consignee.certificate_value:
Khonaysser Motors Sarl
P.O. Box 702
ANTELIAS
Lebanon
consignee.invoice_value:
Khonaysser Motors Sarl
P.O. Box 70268
ANTELIAS 0000
Lebanon
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl' identified exactly in invoice's consignee and invoice address fields. Minor numerical difference in postal box number ('702' vs '70268') allowed by rules. Land 'Lebanon' matches exactly. Factureringsfält (Invoice to, Consignee) clearly states this company.

goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description accompanied by explicit invoice reference 'See attached invoice 61622310/1S, dated 2026-02-26'. Invoice number and date match exactly. Therefore, per rule 4.3.5, goods description is verified without detailed text matching.

quantity.motivation: Gross Weight 13937.00 KG in certificate matches exactly Total Gross Weight 13937.00 KG in invoice. Units are explicitly stated and consistent. Minor formatting normalization applied. Quantity unit is verified.

origin.motivation: Certificate lists 'Sweden' as origin. Invoice explicitly states 'European Union' and 'Sweden' as origins. EU-normalization rule 4.5.4.1 applies: 'Sweden' is member of EU, and invoice includes explicit origin fields containing 'European Union'. The origin is fully verified.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match according to the defined rules with high confidence. No discrepancies detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet stämmer med fakturan. Consignor, consignee, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland är verifierade och godkända. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuell handläggning.
